title: ASTARON 30 Pcs Rubbers Erasers Assortment Novelty Erasers for Party Favors, Kids and Animal Styles
features: Package Includes： 30 pieces pencil erasers for students.（a variety of styles are randomly mixed）.
Cute Erasers：these erasers are very cute and come in different shapes, including rabbits, puppies, monkeys, flowers, cats, chickens, frogs, bring a fun for children's boring learning.
Rubber Material ：made of rubber, the moderate softness makes these erasers feel good in the hand and them work great in cleaning pencil marks.
Size: the diameter of a single eraser is between 2cm - 3cm (0.78" - 1.18"), which is very suitable for children's fingers to hold, and it will not take up a lot of space in a stationery box.
Gift Ideas: them can be given to students as rewards in class,and can also be school stationery for your child, or as party favors for kids.
description: Specifications: Material: rubber. Size: 2cm - 2.5cm (0.78" - 1") in diameter， 8mm/ 0.31" in thickness . Mixed styles: rabbits, puppies, monkeys, flowers, cats, chickens, frogs, etc. ​ Package Includes: 30 pieces pencil erasers （a variety of styles are randomly mixed）.
